channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 24.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer will not attempt to block Burnham from standing to be MP in Makerfield - UK politics live
item.description: Starmer will not attempt to block Burnham from standing to be MP in Makerfield - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
item.description: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM

item.title: BBC Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work?
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work?

item.title: BBC Politics: Andy Burnham: 'King of the North' with eyes on the top job
item.description: Andy Burnham: 'King of the North' with eyes on the top job

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Every Labour MP who has demanded Starmer quit as number reaches 96
item.description: Every Labour MP who has demanded Starmer quit as number reaches 96

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘We will change Labour for the better’: Andy Burnham’s full statement as he plots return to parliament
item.description: ‘We will change Labour for the better’: Andy Burnham’s full statement as he plots return to parliament

item.title: i Politics: Rayner open to Cabinet return - but still feels 'bitter' over treatment from No 10
item.description: Rayner open to Cabinet return - but still feels 'bitter' over treatment from No 10

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: A nightmare for Keir Starmer - but one which could also turn into a nightmare for Andy Burnham and the Labour party as a whole, too:
item.description: A nightmare for Keir Starmer - but one which could also turn into a nightmare for Andy Burnham and the Labour party as a whole, too:

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Burnham has set himself a hard task, but I dont think we really know the dynamics of a by-election serving as a test prime ministerial run from a popular local figure, because it's madness and has never happened.
item.description: Burnham has set himself a hard task, but I dont think we really know the dynamics of a by-election serving as a test prime ministerial run from a popular local figure, because it's madness and has never happened.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Burnham seeks to stand in by-election paving way for Labour leadership challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: Burnham seeks to stand in by-election paving way for Labour leadership challenge
